per_query.question: What are the names (not symbol) of the top 5 non-ETF stocks listed on the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) that had more up days than down days in 2017? (Up days: closing price > opening price; Down days: closing price < opening price)
per_query.ground_truth:
MFA Financial, Inc
Argo Group International Holdings, Ltd
HDFC Bank Limited Common Stock
Albany International Corporation Common Stock
DTE Energy Company

trials.question: What are the names (not symbol) of the top 5 non-ETF stocks listed on the New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) that had more up days than down days in 2017? (Up days: closing price > opening price; Down days: closing price < opening price)
trials.answer:
Essex Property Trust, Inc
General Dynamics Corporation specializes in aerospace and defense, providing advanced technology solutions to governments and commercial customers worldwide
Mettler-Toledo International, Inc
Saratoga Investment Corp
Sunlands Technology Group specializes in providing online education services, offering a range of courses to help learners in China enhance their professional skills and knowledge
Total: 5

steps.reasoning: Need to find non-ETF stocks listed on NYSE (Listing Exchange='N'), get their symbols, then query DuckDB to count up days vs down days in 2017 for each, rank by (up days - down days) descending, and return top 5 company names.

steps.query_used: SELECT Symbol, "Company Description" FROM stockinfo WHERE ETF='N' AND "Listing Exchange"='N'

SELECT symbol, up_days, down_days, net FROM (
  SELECT 'AEFC' as symbol, 
    COUNT(CASE WHEN Close > Open THEN 1 END) as up_days,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN Close < Open THEN 1 END) as down_days,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN Close > Open THEN 1 END) - COUNT(CASE WHEN Close < Open THEN 1 END) as net 
  FROM AEFC WHERE Date LIKE '2017%'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'AIN' as symbol, 
    COUNT(CASE WHEN Close > Open THEN 1 END) as up_days,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN Close < Open THEN 1 END) as down_days,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN Close > Open THEN 1 END) - COUNT(CASE WHEN Close < Open THEN 1 END) as net 
  FROM AIN WHERE Date LIKE '2017%'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'AIV' as symbol, 
    COUNT(CASE WHEN Close > Open THEN 1 END) as up_days,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN Close < Open THEN 1 END) as down_days,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN Close > Open THEN 1 END) - COUNT(CASE WHEN Close < Open THEN 1 END) as net 
  FROM AIV WHERE Date LIKE '2017%'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'AIZP' as symbol, 
    COUNT(CASE WHEN Close > Open THEN 1 END) as up_days,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN Close < Open THEN 1 END) as down_days,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN Close > Open THEN 1 END) - COUNT(CASE WHEN Close < Open THEN 1 END) as net 
  FROM AIZP WHERE Date LIKE '2017%'
  UNION ALL
  SELECT 'AJRD' as symbol, 
    COUNT(CASE WHEN Close > Open THEN 1 END) as up_days,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN Close < Open THEN 1 END) as down_days,
    COUNT(CASE WHEN Close > Open THEN 1 END) - COUNT(CASE WHEN Close < Open THEN 1 END) as net 
  FROM AJRD WHERE Date LIKE '2017%'
) t WHERE net >
